title: Former Budapest mayor ready to do 'everything in power' to unfreeze EU funds
content: Kata Tüttő, former deputy mayor of Budapest, said the city “suffered a lot” under Viktor Orbán’s rule. Now President of the European Committee of the Regions, she also warned against a “wave of centralisation” threatening Europe’s regions.

title: 'One of the worst accidents' at Belgian level crossing, officials say after deadly crash

title: 'No alternative to full EU membership', Ukraine’s deputy PM tells Euronews
content: Brussels must speed up the EU accession process and full membership remains the only option, Ukraine’s Deputy Prime Minister for European and Euro-Atlantic Integration, Taras Kachka, tells Euronews.
snippet: Brussels must speed up the EU accession process and full membership remains the only option, Ukraine’s Deputy Prime Minister for European and Euro-Atlantic Integration, Taras Kachka, tells Euronews.

title: Jewellery, watches and cash in golf bags seized in Zapatero case in Spain

title: Two swimmers killed as French authorities warn of deadly riptides across Atlantic coastline
content: Warm weather across France attracted large crowds to the Gironde coastline in the southwest despite dangerous sea conditions. Authorities said over 30 people were rescued, while two others lost their lives after being caught in strong currents.

title: Shocking case in France: Two minors in custody after 12-year-old found dead with towel around neck

title: Russia urges foreign residents and diplomats to leave Kyiv as it threatens more strikes

title: Gaza flotilla activists faced police violence upon return to Spain. Israel: “It’s hypocrisy"

title: Democratic Rally wins Cyprus election as far right and newcomers make gains
content: Centre-right Democratic Rally (DISY) secured first place in Cyprus’s parliamentary election, ahead of the left-wing AKEL. Far-right ELAM achieved historic breakthrough into third place, while newly formed anti-corruption ALMA and Fidias Panayiotou's Direct Democracy both crossed the threshold.

title: 'Reckless escalation': Europe condemns Russia’s use of 'Oreshnik' missile
content: Russia’s use of the “Oreshnik” missile has drawn international attention. According to Moscow, the intermediate-range missile is capable of striking targets across large parts of Europe.
snippet: Russia’s use of the “Oreshnik” missile has drawn international attention. According to Moscow, the intermediate-range missile is capable of striking targets across large parts of Europe.

title: What is Russia’s Oreshnik missile?
content: Russia’s Oreshnik missile is a nuclear-capable intermediate-range ballistic missile that Moscow says can evade air defences and strike targets across Europe at hypersonic speeds.
snippet: Russia’s Oreshnik missile is a nuclear-capable intermediate-range ballistic missile that Moscow says can evade air defences and strike targets across Europe at hypersonic speeds.

title: Pope Leo XIV visits southern Italy's 'Land of Fires'

title: Two French boys abandoned in Portugal to be returned to France, court document says
